title: Left Forgotten
description: Once glory days of Minecraft, now buried beneath the void. Minecraft Alpha is still there, but left and abandoned ages ago.
body:
# Left Forgotten Left to fade away into distant memories
*Competitor to Alpha Below/The World Below*
*Based on a [tweet by @SlimerSlimy](https://x.com/SlimerSlimy/status/2026360433544683796) and Minecraft Alpha 1.1.2_01 (the actual version, not the fangame)*
## Why? Mainly just to play around with parts of [True End's](https://modrinth.com/mod/true_end) code for soon coming Fabric+Forge port (and because I was bored) ## Description Left Forgotten adds a Alpha-like dimension accessible by blowing a hole in Overworld's bedrock layer wherever there is Brittle Bedrock.
It is dark and abandoned, untouched in years and shadowed by the overworld above with no mobs or anything alive other than some vegetation.

This is not a horror mod, but rather a adventure and decoration mod. Just plain old **Minecraft Alpha 1.1.2_01** with a few remnants of player activity from many years ago.
## Features - Is (supposed to be) multi-loader and multi-version (I'm working on it) - See what Minecraft versions I'll update this to lower on this mod page - A dimension based on Minecraft Alpha 1.1.2_01 - Accessible by going into the Overworld void - Escapable by either attempted death or flying up to the bedrock ceiling - Leaving via death will cancel the damage and just teleport you to your spawnpoint - World generation straight from 1.1.2_01 - Yes, there are Farlands - *"Old player activity"* features - Chopped down trees (fully, one block left, not fully chopped down) - Nearly all blocks present in Minecraft Alpha 1.1.2_01 - With modern variants of them, mainly made for decoration - Minecraft Alpha's gameplay features - Version Overlay - Version-Accurate HUD - No sprint - No attack cooldown - Alpha Food-Health System - Wool drops from sheep when damaged - Blocky lighting - Old hurt sound - B o a t . - Aka crappy pre-1.9 boat that everyone knows and loves - Only music from Minecraft Volume Alpha in the dimension - +A chance to get an unused track "Droopy Likes Your Face" - +A chance to get screwed by music disc 13 ## Dependencies and Mod Compatibility
REQUIRES Fabric - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)
Forge - [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)
RECOMMENDS [Polymorph](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymorph), [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)
BROKEN BUT PLAYABLE [Big Globe](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-globe)
*Entering and leaving works fine. The Brittle Bedrock though? It can't even generate at Big Globe's bedrock layer to give the player easier access to this mod's content.
INCOMPATIBLE [True End](https://modrinth.com/mod/true_end)
*Due to similar codebases, as both were partially or fully made by JustMili.
### When newer Minecraft versions? With version 1.1.x Left Forgotten will update from Fabric+Forge 1.20.1 to: - (DONE) 1.21.1 Fabric & NeoForge - (1.21.6-)1.21.8 Fabric & NeoForge - 1.21.11 Fabric & NeoForge - 26.1.2 and onwards Fabric-Only ***REMEMBER! MOD DEVELOPMENT TAKES TIME! :D*** ### How long will this be kept updated? Probably for very long like my other projects.
